Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The white sand on the beach is so fine...[n]It feels nice underneath my feet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, Elizabeth asked me to[n]get her something that feels like the ocean...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Elizabeth might be happy if I gave her[n]a pretty seashell from the beach.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should bring back a pretty seashell[n]from the beach as a memento of Yakushima.[n]{f 1 1}
